title: HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON - 211info
text: A FAMILY PLACE MCMINNVILLE HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained home visitors who coach families in parenting skills development. Clients also recieve information on topics such as child development, infant care, child health, and information and referral for outside agencies. 125 SE Cowls Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-3 months Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, evening home visits available by arrangement Email (971) 241-9258 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 472-4020 Main phone Main phone (971) 241-9258 Bilingual Family Enrollment Specialist Marisela Huizar Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Lower level of First Baptist Church Services: Home Based Parenting Education Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THERAPEUTIC CLASSROOM AND RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. A FAMILY PLACE MCMINNVILLE
